description_long: This is a softcover book with a patchwork-style cover in shades of pink, beige, and brown, featuring visible stitched seams and a slightly irregular, hand-crafted appearance. The book is relatively thin and rectangular, with two prominent white ring bindings on one side, suggesting it may be a notebook or journal. The cover has a small, light-colored rectangular label with handwritten text, giving it a personalized or artistic feel. The edges of the cover and pages are uneven, further emphasizing a handmade or casual aesthetic. The book appears to be made primarily of paper or thin cardboard, with the rings likely made of plastic or coated metal. There are no visible illustrations or publisher logos on the cover, and the overall design is minimalist and modern.
description: A thin, patchwork-style softcover book with white ring bindings and a handwritten label on the front. The cover features pink, beige, and brown tones with visible stitched seams.
description_view_0: Front view showing the patchwork cover, handwritten label, and two white ring bindings on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the book's thinness, the patchwork design, and the rings protruding from the top.
description_view_2: Back view with the patchwork cover and label visible, showing the rings on the right side.
description_view_3: Spine view displaying the two white rings and the layered, uneven edges of the cover and pages.
